title: The Man with 100 Faces
writer: William Blair Morton Ferguson, Basil Mason, A.R. Rawlinson
actors: Tom Walls, Lilli Palmer, Noel Madison
plot: Jack Drake,a man with a hundred faces and in reality a modern-day Robin Hood known only as Crackerjack, thrills all England with his exploits of stealing from the rich and giving to the poor. As a guest at a society party "Cracker...
